LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SKILLZ INC. DEMURS TO THE SECOND THROUGH SIXTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN PLAINTIFF NATHANIEL TSEGAY'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (FAC). THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION TWO THROUGH FOUR AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FIVE AND SIX. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SKILLZ INC'S DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT

Defendant Skillz Inc. demurs to the second through sixth causes of action in plaintiff Nathaniel Tsegay's First Amended Complaint (FAC). The demurrer is overruled as to causes of action two through four and sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action five and six.

(SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
